description_long: This is a pointed, patchwork witch hat with a tall, dramatically curved crown and a wide, floppy brim. The hat is constructed from irregular, stitched-together fabric panels in a muted brownish-gray color, giving it a worn and rustic appearance. A dark band encircles the base of the crown, adding a subtle accent to the design. A small, black spider dangles from the tip of the hat by a thin thread, serving as a whimsical and slightly spooky decorative element. The surface of the hat appears soft and textured, with visible seams and a matte finish. The overall style is evocative of classic Halloween or fantasy witch attire, making it a distinctive and eye-catching accessory.
description: A patchwork, brownish-gray witch hat with a wide brim, curved crown, and a dangling black spider ornament. The hat has a rustic, stitched appearance and a dark band around the base.
description_view_0: The hat's curved crown and wide brim are clearly visible, with the black spider hanging from the tip on the right side.
description_view_1: The hat is seen from the front, showing the pointed tip curving forward and the spider hanging directly below the tip.
description_view_2: The hat's left side is visible, with the spider now hanging from the tip on the left, and the patchwork texture is prominent.
description_view_3: The back of the hat is shown, highlighting the tall, curved crown and the wide, floppy brim without the spider in view.
